extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by versus against the parties: I counted only the Against rows—criminal proceedings are Nil against the Company and Directors and 1 against Promoters, statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil in all Against rows, and tax proceedings are 1 against the Company; all By rows were excluded. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹27.27 lakhs, while the Promoters’ amount is Not ascertainable and Directors’ amount is Nil, so the company-group litigation total is ₹0.2727 crore (₹27.27 lakhs ÷ 100), including the tax matter. Contingent liabilities use the stated Total of ₹500.00 lakhs as of September 30, 2023, converted to ₹50.00 crore (₹500.00 lakhs ÷ 100). The only company-wide customer concentration disclosed is top 10 customers’ 20.68% of revenue from operations for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2023; no top-five company-wide percentage is disclosed, and segment-only percentages were not used. The source monetary tables use lakhs, converted to crore at 100 lakhs per crore.
